name: speakeasy-clone
description: Read-only MCP surface for the speakeasy-clone design-language and asset archive.
boundaries: Read-only. No mutations, no credentials, no external calls.
Never expose raw private paths, secrets, or browser session state.
Human approval required before any destructive or deployment operation.

tools.name: get_repo_info
tools.description: Return repo identity: slug, lane, status, source-of-truth URLs.

tools.name: get_capabilities
tools.description: Return the capability contract declared in cli/manifest.json.

tools.name: get_design_tokens
tools.description: Return the design tokens extracted from the live site (.designlang/speakeasybarberlounge-com-design-tokens.json).

tools.name: run_smoke
tools.description: Run the deterministic local smoke check and return pass/fail with details.

resources.name: design_language
resources.description: All files under .designlang/ describing the extracted design language of the site.

resources.name: proof
resources.description: Proof packets and smoke results under proof/.

prompts.name: audit_design_language
prompts.description: Prompt an agent to audit the extracted design language and produce a summary of color palette, typography, and component patterns.
prompts.template: Review the files in .designlang/ for the speakeasy-clone repo. Summarize: (1) brand color palette, (2) typography scale, (3) component patterns, (4) any design-system gaps. Do not print private paths or credentials.

prompts.name: v10_harvest_plan
prompts.description: Prompt an agent to produce an asset harvest plan for the consolidation action.
prompts.template: This repo's consolidation action is archive-after-asset-harvest targeting speakeasy-barbershop. Review the tracked files and propose: (1) which assets to harvest, (2) which to discard, (3) what ProofPacket to write before archiving. Do not deploy or delete anything.
